offer: For property managers handling 5–15 rental units/month, inefficient tracking of maintenance requests causes delayed responses. We automate work order generation instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or emails.
problem: Inefficient tracking of maintenance requests leads to delayed responses.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try work order generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
